form.prompt_placeholder: Include client need, your quote, objection (too expensive / lower budget / competitor cheaper), and your floor price.
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload reference images, support multiple images
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content

deal_strategy.title: Deal Strategy Pack Generator
deal_strategy.description: Focus on price objections: too expensive, limited budget, cheaper competitor.

fields.client_need_placeholder: What does the client want to buy and what result do they expect?
fields.client_objection_placeholder: e.g. Too expensive. Another provider is cheaper.

errors.invalid_input: Please complete all required fields with valid prices.
errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please buy credits first.
errors.feedback_failed: Feedback submit failed, please try again.

paywall.description: Preview generated. Unlock full scripts, logic and actions with 1 credit.
